task: Docs-only design spec for Finance Hub FH-5 (Bankruptcy Calculator/Modeler) -- most complex + sensitive, build last. TRANSP's Chapter 11 plan is CONFIRMED (reorganized terms are real). Select all loans/assets/debts, enter reorganized terms (new balances/rates/amortization schedules via FH-3). Two outputs: (1) ongoing TRACKER plan-vs-actuals, (2) BENEFIT ANALYSIS before-vs-after (old vs new total obligation, interest saved, monthly-payment delta). Central design fork documented: do confirmed reorganized balances POST to live books, live in modeling layer, or BOTH (recommended: book once with accountant + keep modeler for tracking). Any posting gated (flag default OFF, preview-first, balance-or-fail, GUARD-reviewed, audited, with accountant, never auto-fired). Data model (bankruptcy.plans/obligations/plan_schedules), access-restricted (Owner/Accountant, ties to Permissions block), sensitivity handling, open questions for Jorge+counsel, gated build sequence. NO code, no DDL, no posting. VOID != DELETE. Designed live with Jorge + bankruptcy counsel + GUARD before any code.
